member.name: T:JsonhCs.JsonhNumberParser
member.summary: Methods for parsing JSONH numbers.
member.remarks: Unlike , minimal validation is done here. Ensure the input is valid.

member.name: M:JsonhCs.JsonhNumberParser.Parse(System.String)
member.summary:
Converts a JSONH number to a base-10 real. For example:
Input: +5.2e3.0
Output: 5200

member.name: M:JsonhCs.JsonhNumberParser.ParseFractionalNumberWithExponent(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char},System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Converts a fractional number with an exponent (e.g. 12.3e4.5) from the given base (e.g. 01234567) to a base-10 real.

member.name: M:JsonhCs.JsonhNumberParser.ParseFractionalNumber(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char},System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Converts a fractional number (e.g. 123.45) from the given base (e.g. 01234567) to a base-10 real.

member.name: M:JsonhCs.JsonhNumberParser.ParseWholeNumber(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char},System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Converts a whole number (e.g. 12345) from the given base (e.g. 01234567) to a base-10 integer.

member.name: T:JsonhCs.JsonhNumberParserBig
member.summary: Methods for parsing JSONH numbers.
member.remarks: Unlike , minimal validation is done here. Ensure the input is valid.

member.name: M:JsonhCs.JsonhNumberParserBig.Parse(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary:
Converts a JSONH number to a base-10 real. For example:
Input: +5.2e3.0
Output: 5200
member.param: Number of decimal places to use when a fractional exponent is given.

member.name: M:JsonhCs.JsonhNumberParserBig.ParseFractionalNumberWithExponent(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char},System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char},System.Int32)
member.summary: Converts a fractional number with an exponent (e.g. 12.3e4.5) from the given base (e.g. 01234567) to a base-10 real.

member.name: M:JsonhCs.JsonhNumberParserBig.ParseFractionalNumber(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char},System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Converts a fractional number (e.g. 123.45) from the given base (e.g. 01234567) to a base-10 real.

member.name: M:JsonhCs.JsonhNumberParserBig.ParseWholeNumber(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char},System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Converts a whole number (e.g. 12345) from the given base (e.g. 01234567) to a base-10 integer.

member.name: T:JsonhCs.JsonhReader
member.summary: A reader that reads JSONH tokens from a .

member.name: P:JsonhCs.JsonhReader.TextReader
member.summary: The text reader to read characters from.

member.name: P:JsonhCs.JsonhReader.Options
member.summary: The options to use when reading JSONH.

member.name: P:JsonhCs.JsonhReader.CharCounter
member.summary: The number of characters read from .

member.name: P:JsonhCs.JsonhReader.Line
member.summary: The current line being read

member.name: P:JsonhCs.JsonhReader.Column
member.summary: The current column being read

member.name: P:JsonhCs.JsonhReader.Depth
member.summary: The current recursion depth of the reader.

member.name: P:JsonhCs.JsonhReader.ReservedChars
member.summary: Characters that cannot be used unescaped in quoteless strings.

member.name: F:JsonhCs.JsonhReader.ReservedCharsV1
member.summary: Characters that cannot be used unescaped in quoteless strings in JSONH V1.

member.name: F:JsonhCs.JsonhReader.ReservedCharsV2
member.summary: Characters that cannot be used unescaped in quoteless strings in JSONH V2.

member.name: F:JsonhCs.JsonhReader.NewlineChars
member.summary: Characters that are considered newlines.

member.name: F:JsonhCs.JsonhReader.UnreferencedCodeMessage
member.summary: Warning message for dynamic serialization.

member.name: M:JsonhCs.JsonhReader.#ctor(System.IO.TextReader,System.Nullable{JsonhCs.JsonhReaderOptions})
member.summary: Constructs a reader that reads JSONH from a text reader.

member.name: M:JsonhCs.JsonhReader.#ctor(System.IO.Stream,System.Text.Encoding,System.Nullable{JsonhCs.JsonhReaderOptions})
member.summary: Constructs a reader that reads JSONH from a stream using a given encoding.

member.name: M:JsonhCs.JsonhReader.#ctor(System.IO.Stream,System.Nullable{JsonhCs.JsonhReaderOptions})
member.summary: Constructs a reader that reads JSONH from a stream using the byte-order marks to detect the encoding.

member.name: M:JsonhCs.JsonhReader.#ctor(System.String,System.Nullable{JsonhCs.JsonhReaderOptions})
member.summary: Constructs a reader that reads JSONH from a string.

member.name: M:JsonhCs.JsonhReader.Dispose
member.summary: Releases all unmanaged resources used by the reader.

member.name: M:JsonhCs.JsonhReader.ParseElement``1(System.IO.TextReader,System.Nullable{JsonhCs.JsonhReaderOptions})
member.summary: Parses a single element from a text reader.

member.name: M:JsonhCs.JsonhReader.ParseElement``1(System.IO.Stream,System.Text.Encoding,System.Nullable{JsonhCs.JsonhReaderOptions})
member.summary: Parses a single element from a stream using a given encoding.

member.name: M:JsonhCs.JsonhReader.ParseElement``1(System.IO.Stream,System.Nullable{JsonhCs.JsonhReaderOptions})
member.summary: Parses a single element from a stream using the byte-order marks to detect the encoding.

member.name: M:JsonhCs.JsonhReader.ParseElement``1(System.String,System.Nullable{JsonhCs.JsonhReaderOptions})
member.summary: Parses a single element from a string.

member.name: M:JsonhCs.JsonhReader.ParseElement``1
member.summary: Parses a single element from the reader.

member.name: M:JsonhCs.JsonhReader.ParseNode
member.summary: Parses a single from the reader.

member.name: M:JsonhCs.JsonhReader.ParseJson(System.Boolean,System.String)
member.summary:
Parses a single element as JSON from the reader.
If is true, comments are included (/* and */ are escaped as / * and * /).
If is not null, the output is pretty-printed with the given indentation.
The result is not safe to embed in HTML.

member.name: M:JsonhCs.JsonhReader.FindPropertyValue(System.String)
M:JsonhCs.JsonhReader.HasToken
member.summary: Reads whitespace and returns whether the reader contains another token.

member.name: M:JsonhCs.JsonhReader.ReadEndOfElements
member.summary: Reads comments and whitespace and errors if the reader contains another element.

member.name: M:JsonhCs.JsonhReader.ReadElement
member.summary: Reads a single element from the reader.

member.name: P:JsonhCs.JsonhReader.MiniJson
member.summary:
A preset for reading and writing JSON with minimal formatting.
Allows reading numbers from strings
Allows named floating point literals
Allows trailing commas
Always writes newlines as \n
Allows but skips comments
Uses relaxed JSON escaping

member.name: P:JsonhCs.JsonhReader.PrettyJson
member.summary:
A preset for reading and writing JSON with indented formatting.
Allows reading numbers from strings
Allows named floating point literals
Allows trailing commas
Always writes newlines as \n
Allows but skips comments
Uses relaxed JSON escaping
Writes indents as tabs

member.name: T:JsonhCs.JsonhReaderOptions
member.summary: Options for a .

member.name: M:JsonhCs.JsonhReaderOptions.#ctor
member.summary: Options for a .

member.name: P:JsonhCs.JsonhReaderOptions.Version
member.summary: Specifies the major version of the JSONH specification to use.

member.name: P:JsonhCs.JsonhReaderOptions.ParseSingleElement
member.summary:
Enables/disables checks for exactly one element when parsing.
"cat" "dog" // Error: Expected single element
member.remarks: This option does not apply when reading elements, only when parsing elements.

member.name: P:JsonhCs.JsonhReaderOptions.MaxDepth
member.remarks: The default value is 64 to defend against DOS attacks.

member.name: P:JsonhCs.JsonhReaderOptions.IncompleteInputs
member.remarks:
This is potentially useful for large language models that stream responses.
Only some tokens can be incomplete in this mode, so it should not be relied upon.

member.name: P:JsonhCs.JsonhReaderOptions.BigNumbers
member.summary:
Enables/disables parsing of numbers outside the range/precision of a double-precision float.
1e99999 // parsed as exact number instead of infinity
member.remarks: Numbers will be parsed as instead of .

member.name: M:JsonhCs.JsonhReaderOptions.SupportsVersion(JsonhCs.JsonhVersion)
member.summary: Returns whether is greater than or equal to .

member.name: T:JsonhCs.JsonhToken
member.summary: A single JSONH token.

member.name: M:JsonhCs.JsonhToken.#ctor(System.Text.Json.JsonTokenType,System.String)
member.summary: A single JSONH token.

member.name: P:JsonhCs.JsonhToken.JsonType
member.summary: The type of the token.

member.name: P:JsonhCs.JsonhToken.Value
member.summary: The value of the token, or an empty string.

member.name: T:JsonhCs.JsonhVersion
member.summary: The major versions of the JSONH specification.

member.name: F:JsonhCs.JsonhVersion.Latest
member.summary: Indicates that the latest version should be used (currently ).

member.name: F:JsonhCs.JsonhVersion.V1
member.summary: Version 1 of the specification, released 2025/03/19.

member.name: F:JsonhCs.JsonhVersion.V2
member.summary: Version 2 of the specification, released 2025/11/19.
